message:
fix(web): resolve remaining conflict markers in tldr-content.ts

The prior merge conflict resolution (80d87cf1) left 2 conflict marker
regions in tldr-content.ts:

1. XF (X Archive Search) techStack/keyFeatures/useCases had jumbled
   duplicate entries from both sides — resolved to the clean version
   with SIMD/F16 quantization stack and DM context search features.

2. Hero stats section had duplicate description/stats blocks — resolved
   to the current "16 core tools and 13 supporting utilities" with
   totalCount: 29.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
